intro: Keysseria wollastonii, also known as K. wollastonii, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Aristolochiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in relieving symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of K. wollastonii include aristolochic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, as well as other alkaloids and phenolic compounds. Keysseria wollastonii is commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of various infections.
